title: Ashlar Project Configuration
description: Configuration written by `ashlar init` and consumed by all CLI commands.

registry.description: Path or URL to the component registry. Filesystem path (relative or absolute) for local prototypes; HTTP(S) URL when the public registry ships.

componentsDir.description: Directory where installed component source is written, relative to project root.

indexesDir.description: Directory where the CLI writes generated component and evidence indexes for runtime consumption.

entrypoint.description: Path to the generated stylesheet that aggregates token + base + component CSS.

theme.description: Path to the generated theme stylesheet.

tailwindTheme.description: Path to the generated Tailwind v4 @theme companion stylesheet.

tokenTypes.description: Path to the generated TypeScript token contract.

audit.description: Audit-time configuration including per-language grammar registration for opt-in languages.

grammar.description: Grammar identifier (npm package or path) for ast-grep custom-language registration.

rules.description: Paths to project-specific ast-grep YAML rule files.
